title: thymus jankae subsp. skorpilii
intro: Thymus jankae subsp. skorpilii, also known as Thymus skorpili, is a subspecies of the Thymus jankae plant, which is a type of thyme native to Bulgaria. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its essential oil composition. The health benefits of Thymus skorpilii include its potential to help with respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to support the immune system and provide antioxidant properties. Thymus skorpilii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used as a flavoring agent in various culinary applications.
